purpose: Declares the single writer for each piece of runtime truth. 'Writer' is the domain authorised to mutate this truth. Everything else is a reader.

rules.shadow_write_notes: No domain may write an owned truth through a utility, middleware, or shared helper. If that feels necessary, the ownership model is wrong and must be amended.

before_any_mutation: Look up the truth in this contract
If not listed, stop and register it before mutating
If listed and you are not the declared writer, route the mutation through the writer
on_multiple_writers_discovered: Record the violation in .law/context/current-system.json under contradiction_map
